overall.description: A cinematic scene from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character with a distinctive mohawk hairstyle sitting on a futuristic waterfront promenade. The character interacts with a handheld tablet device while seated under a modern glass and orange metal canopy, with palm trees and a holographic billboard visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade under glass canopy

events.description: character pulls out a tablet device and begins interacting with it

agents.ego_description: sitting on a bench under the canopy, then retrieves a tablet device from their lap

entered.detail: futuristic orange structural beam supporting the canopy roof
transparent glass roof structure providing partial shade
tall digital billboard displaying colorful animated content
tall palm trees lining the waterfront promenade
metal railing separating the promenade from the water
large square concrete paving tiles with shadow patterns

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunny futuristic waterfront promenade with a character sitting under a glass and orange metal canopy. The character retrieves a tablet device while palm trees sway in the background and a holographic billboard displays advertisements in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade under glass canopy

events.description: pedestrian in red plaid shirt walks past the camera from left to right, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: focused on using the tablet device, typing and swiping on the screen while seated

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red plaid shirt walks quickly from left to right past the camera

segments.scene_description: The character remains seated under the canopy, actively using the tablet device. A pedestrian in a red plaid shirt walks past the camera from left to right, briefly obscuring the view. The background remains consistent with the waterfront promenade, palm trees, and distant pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade under glass canopy

events.description: character puts away the tablet device and returns to a relaxed sitting posture

agents.ego_description: puts away the tablet device and sits back, looking around the promenade

segments.scene_description: The character concludes their interaction with the tablet, putting it away and returning to a relaxed seated position under the canopy. The scene remains static with the futuristic waterfront promenade visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a continuous moment on a sunny futuristic waterfront promenade, focusing on a character's brief interaction with a handheld device. It begins with the character sitting under a glass and orange metal canopy, retrieving a tablet as palm trees sway and a holographic billboard glows in the distance. As the character actively uses the device, a pedestrian in a red plaid shirt walks across the frame, briefly obscuring the view of the surrounding promenade. The scene then settles as the character concludes their task and puts the tablet away, returning to a relaxed posture. Finally, the camera lingers on the character in their seated position against the backdrop of the vibrant, high-tech waterfront.
